DAC_Label_In_Name_01


Description

URL: https://fes-ext.pre.private.defra.gov.uk/create-catch-certificate/privacy-notice
Page title: Privacy Notice - Create a UK catch certificate - Welcome to GOV.UK 
Journey 1, step 3.

Preview unavailable

A link has been assigned an aria-label which does not contain the string displayed in the visible link text. This can be problematic for voice activation users who may be unable to reference the link by its visible label.


For screen reader users, the link uses the abbreviation ‘MMO’ which users may not understand as the full meaning has not been conveyed anywhere on the page.

Solution:
1. Ensure that the accessible name contains the text that is presented visually. Remove the aria-label from the link as it may prevent voice activation users from being able to reference the link using voice commands.
2. Change the link text to expand the meaning of the abbreviation as it is currently a URL which may be difficult to refer to by voice activation and to understand for screen reader users. 

Example: 

<a class="govuk-link" href="Marine Management Organisation " target="blank" aria-label="Opens link for information about MMO">Find out more about the Marine Management Organisation (MMO)<!-- --> <!-- -->(opens in new tab)</a>

Acceptance Criteria:

Accessible name contains the text that is presented visually

Link text expanded with the meaning of the abbreviation
